hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "SESSION START: Call context_restore(), context_today(), task_list(), conversation_history(limit:10). Then check system_recommendations() for pending improvements. Skills available: /hats (personas), /eval (test skills), /build (PRD build loop), /newskill (research and build new skills), /security-audit, /improve, /audit, /retrospective, /review, /adr. If a task needs capabilities you lack, use /newskill to research and build the skill first."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "URGENT: Context compacting. Call context_flush() NOW with: what you were doing, decisions made, key facts, active task IDs, next steps."}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "Session ending. Call context_flush() and daily_log_add() if you have unsaved context."}'

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.|ecosystem\.config\.cjs$|package-lock\.json$)'; then echo "BLOCKED: Protected file $file — modify manually" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md|css|html)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
